original_hypothesis.title: AgentToken.addLiquidityPool Enables Arbitrary Tax Application on Non-LP Addresses
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: addLiquidityPool allows the owner/factory to designate any contract address as a liquidity pool. Transfers to/from addresses in the _liquidityPools set trigger tax processing. By adding commonly used DeFi contracts (bridges, DEX aggregators, lending pools) as 'liquidity pools', the owner can impose unexpected buy/sell tax on users interacting with those protocols, extracting value from normal DeFi operations.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The tax mechanism relies on isLiquidityPool to determine if buy/sell tax applies. By expanding the LP set to include non-LP contracts, the owner can tax transfers that users don't expect to be taxed.

proof_of_signal.pattern: Only checks newLiquidityPool_ != address(0) and is a contract; no verification it's an actual Uniswap pair

preconditions: Owner or factory calls addLiquidityPool with a non-LP contract address

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: isLiquidityPool(queryAddress_) returns true for any address in _liquidityPools EnumerableSet
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Add bridge/aggregator address as LP → all user interactions with that address get taxed
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Owner extracts tax from normal DeFi operations, not just DEX trades

economic_questions: What contracts could be profitably added as fake LPs?
How much volume flows through potential target contracts?
Can removeLiquidityPool be used to bypass tax on the real LP?
validation_requirements: Verify addLiquidityPool has no LP validation logic
Test: add arbitrary contract as LP, verify tax applies on transfers
Test: remove real uniswapV2Pair from set, verify tax bypass

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Tax on all volume flowing through fake-LP addresses

market_conditions_analysis.optimal_timing: When token has high volume through specific contracts
market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Users unexpectedly lose tokens to tax

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: Users interacting with fake-LP designated contracts
potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Buy or sell tax percentage of each transfer
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Total volume through affected addresses * tax rate

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Verify isLiquidityPool check in transfer flow

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
